title: Image Size, Build Performance, Runtime Efficiency, and Reproducibility · Docker Scenario Checkpoint
summary: A release board compares fresh image size, build performance, runtime efficiency, and reproducibility decisions and accepts only answers tied to observable image, container, build, or Compose evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for measured build and runtime optimization experiment. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Measure compressed, unpacked, shared, unique, and writable size and trace which layer, package, or artifact owns the change.
Measure cold, warm, changed-source, changed-lockfile, and remote-cache builds with plain progress and controlled inputs.
Compare trusted base, distroless or scratch, packages, debugging needs, certificates, locales, dynamic libraries, and patch workflow.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Docker Image Size Layer Analysis
steps.instruction:
Order the Docker Image Size Layer Analysis container delivery evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Docker Image Size Layer Analysis.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Docker Image Size Layer Analysis assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Docker Image Size Layer Analysis, keep Docker Image Size Layer Analysis connected to mechanically reviewable Docker artifact and transfer evidence.

content.text: A quiz team compares a warm local build with a cold CI build and blames a large final image, while context transfer and cross-platform cache dominate. Measure each stage and compare controlled output digests. Competency probe: Measure compressed, unpacked, shared, unique, and writable size and trace which layer, package, or artifact owns the change.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Docker Image Size Layer Analysis has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Docker Image Size Layer Analysis, name the daemon authority, immutable identity, process, storage, network, secret, and cleanup boundary, Docker Image Size Layer Analysis precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Docker Image Size Layer Analysis, trace this concrete input and predict build, image, container, mount, network, Compose, policy, and teardown evidence before reviewing it: A quiz team compares a warm local build with a cold CI build and blames a large final image, while context transfer and cross-platform cache dominate. Measure each stage and compare controlled output digests. Competency probe: Measure compressed, unpacked, shared, unique, and writable size and trace which layer, package, or artifact owns the change.

For Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Docker Image Size Layer Analysis, challenge the documented misconception with manifest, inspect, lifecycle, failure, repair, and transfer evidence: The docker images SIZE column is the exact additional disk and network cost for every host.

options.text: Capture Docker versions, active context, desired artifact, current state, authority, and immutable identities for the quiz Docker Image Size Layer Analysis case
Predict build, image, process, storage, network, Compose, security, and cleanup effects before mutation for the quiz Docker Image Size Layer Analysis case
Review the smallest Dockerfile, Compose, Bake, or policy increment in the deterministic browser simulator for the quiz Docker Image Size Layer Analysis case
Reject one failure, record repair and cleanup, then name the disposable live-environment transfer evidence for the quiz Docker Image Size Layer Analysis case

lines.label: observed

lines.label: required

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Control immutable inputs, time, order, package resolution, frontend and BuildKit compatibility, platform, metadata, and comparison while documenting unavoidable variance.
